ogTitle: Beaudesert vs Beaver Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaudesert and Beaver Rock.
heading: Beaudesert vs Beaver Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaudesert, Queensland and Beaver Rock, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaudesert has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Beaver Rock (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaudesert or Beaver Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaudesert has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Beaver Rock scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaudesert scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Beaver Rock scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaudesert or Beaver Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaudesert has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
